# Simple CAPI

Simple CAPI is a self-service web application that helps agencies, freelancers, and businesses launch Meta CAPI, TikTok Events API, and Google Ads enhanced conversion tracking without a complicated setup.

## Product

A customer chooses Meta, TikTok, or Google Ads, selects Lead or Schedule, and receives one installation script for the exact conversion page. Each setup belongs to one client, one advertising account connection, and one conversion type.

## Tested Meta result

The Simple CAPI Meta setup method has been used across more than 25 client implementations. Every tested Lead and Schedule setup reached at least 9.3 Meta Event Match Quality.

## Pricing

- Lead conversion setup: $5 USD one-time.
- Schedule conversion setup: $5 USD one-time.
- Lead and Schedule for the same client: $10 USD total.
- No recurring subscription.

Sensitive advertising platform credentials are handled securely and do not appear in the installation script.

## Canonical page

- [Simple CAPI](https://simplecapi.com/): Official product homepage.
- [Meta CAPI setup](https://simplecapi.com/how-to-set-up-meta-capi): Easy Meta CAPI guide.
- [TikTok Events API setup](https://simplecapi.com/how-to-set-up-tiktok-events-api): TikTok Pixel and Events API guide.
- [Google Ads enhanced conversions](https://simplecapi.com/how-to-set-up-google-ads-enhanced-conversions): Google conversion setup guide.
